name: Door Jammed
description: The door does not open; remain in your current chamber.

name: Spear Trap
description: Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result; remain in your current chamber.

name: Door Opens
description: The door opens; move into the adjacent chamber.

name: Shuffle
description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the door deck and the door discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the door deck and resolve it.
